cards.title: Access, Visibility, and Dependency
cards.governance_note: Review account access, API access, ranking visibility, marketplace placement, and platform-mediated attention.

cards.title: Interoperability, Portability, and Lock-In
cards.governance_note: Review switching costs, data export, API abstractions, fallback systems, provider dependence, and exit readiness.

cards.title: Audit, Appeals, and Platform Accountability
cards.governance_note: Audit decision logs, ranking-change records, billing reports, appeal mechanisms, and public-interest governance.
